promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active runtime authority, as proof that the bundle is a self-sufficient reproducible run capsule, or as permission to promote the README working-run recipe, clean summary counts, stable end-state hash, or one packet variant into active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the progress-bundle revision pair is now reduced and the working-run bundle is the next source-bearing sibling in the retained foundation family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed bounded seam: a compact operator working-run kit with a packet-mode recipe, two detached strategy packets, a very small embedded two-step snapshot, strong end-state hash consistency, residual kill signals under a clean headline, missing sequence/sim/control surfaces, and an internal same-name different-bytes packet contradiction.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The v2 and v1 progress-bundle children were used to preserve this working-run kit below the broader replay/export family, while the full parent-run child was used to preserve the larger campaign fence and failure/evidence baseline.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the early working-run bundle needs its own A2-mid child before the archive moves into the next ladder family.
Deferred because that parent already has a completed A2-mid child and now serves as comparison support rather than the current primary target.
Deferred because the full parent run already has a completed A2-mid child and now only provides upstream comparison discipline.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summaries already isolate the least noisy packets: compact working-run-kit status, clean parked/reject headline with retained kill signals, partial reproducibility with missing sequence/sim/control surfaces, strong hash residue, and the internal packet-name collision. That is enough for a bounded reduction without reopening raw archive files.

candidate_items.name: WORKING_RUN_BUNDLE_IS_COMPACT_OPERATOR_KIT_NOT_SELF_SUFFICIENT_RUN_CAPSULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent as an early compact working-run kit rather than as a fully self-sufficient archive run capsule.

candidate_items.name: CLEAN_HEADLINE_COUNTS_DO_NOT_ERASE_RETAINED_KILL_AND_BLOCKER_LINEAGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent as clean in parked and rejected totals while still not failure-free in lineage terms because kill signals and unresolved blockers remain retained.

candidate_items.name: STRONG_END_STATE_HASH_AND_MINIMAL_EVENT_PACKET_PROOF_SURVIVE_WITHOUT_FULL_CONTEXT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the stable final hash, minimal event ladder, and tiny packet subset as the strongest retained residues in a bundle that still omits sequence state, sim evidence, and broader control context.

candidate_items.name: PACKET_IDENTITY_COLLISION_ON_000002_MUST_BE_PRESERVED_EXPLICITLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest archive-specific contradiction: the detached and consumed copies of packet 000002 match each other, while the embedded zip_packets copy under the same filename has different bytes.

candidate_items.name: README_WORKING_RUN_RECIPE_IS_REAL_BUT_ONLY_PARTIALLY_REPRODUCIBLE_FROM_THE_BUNDLE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the direct packet-mode recipe as useful operator lineage while blocking overread into full reproducibility because sequence state, metrics, sim evidence, and broader run-control surfaces are absent.

candidate_items.name: NEXT_DESCENT_SHOULD_PROCESS_RUN_FOUNDATION_LADDER_001
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's explicit next-step handoff into the next retained ladder family after this compact working-run bundle.

quarantined_items.name: WORKING_RUN_RECIPE_AS_PROOF_OF_SELF_SUFFICIENT_REPRODUCIBILITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The README reads like a recipe, but the bundle omits sequence state, sim evidence, and heavier run-control surfaces.

quarantined_items.name: ZERO_PARKED_AND_REJECTED_COUNTS_AS_FAILURE_FREE_RUN
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle still preserves two kill signals and two unresolved blockers despite the clean parked/reject headline.

quarantined_items.name: STABLE_HASH_AND_SMALL_PACKET_LADDER_AS_FULL_CONTEXT_OR_EVIDENCE_CLOSURE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Strong state hash and minimal packet proof do not restore missing sequence, sim-evidence, or wider run-control context.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_PACKET_000002_VARIANT_AS_THE_TRUE_ARCHIVE_COPY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle itself preserves two different byte payloads for the same packet filename without local resolution.

quarantined_items.name: EVENT_AND_SOAK_PATH_REFERENCES_AS_PROOF_OF_RETAINED_SIM_EVIDENCE_BODIES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle retains runtime `sim/sim_evidence_*` references without the corresponding local evidence files.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_WORKING_RUN_KIT_AS_EQUIVALENT_TO_LATER_PROGRESS_BUNDLE_REPLAY_FAMILY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This parent is a smaller earlier working-run kit with different packet carriage and no restored sequence control, not the same artifact class as the later progress bundles.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the least noisy reusable packets in the parent: compact working-run-kit demotion, clean parked/reject headline with retained kill signals, strong hash and minimal packet proof with missing context, the packet-identity collision on 000002, partial reproducibility, and the handoff into RUN_FOUNDATION_LADDER_001.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, self-sufficient reproducibility, and packet-identity resolution authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain recipe overread, failure-free overread, strong-residue overread, packet-truth overread, evidence-retention overread, or artifact-class conflation rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
